channel.title: ViralDeals - Garden Inspiration
channel.description: Curated trending garden inspiration from Amazon India.

item.title: Beat the Heat with Eco-Friendly Lizard Repellent 🦎
item.description:
As you plan your summer outdoor activities, don't let unwanted lizards ruin the fun. Introducing this excellent Gecko Aerosol Based Odour Free Herbal Lizard Repellent Spray from Shadow Securitronics, which is not only eco-friendly and biodegradable but also free from harsh chemicals. With over 3380 reviews and a decent 3.9-star rating, it's worth buying for your home and garden. Beat the heat with peace of mind. Click to explore the best...
#SummerSale #HomeDecorForSummer #OutdoorActivities

item.title: Must-Have Car Rat Repellent this Summer ☀️
item.description:
Beat the heat and pesky rodents at the same time with this highly effective Tom CAT No Entry Rat Repellent Spray for Cars. Lasting up to 1 year, this leak-free spray makes it the perfect solution for car owners. With thousands of positive reviews and a 4.1-star rating, this product actually works in keeping rats away. Make it a part of your summer car care routine worth buying today!
#SummerSale #HomeDecor #RodentControl
